### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/go-criu (github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v8)</summary>

### [`v8.4.0`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/releases/tag/v8.4.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.3.0...v8.4.0)

#### What's Changed

- readme: bump latest version to v8.3.0 by [@​snprajwal](https://redirect.github.com/snprajwal) in [#​250](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/250)
- build(deps): bump codecov/codecov-action from 6 to 7 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​249](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/249)
- Modernize sources by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​251](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/251)
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 6 to 7 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​252](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/252)
- build(deps): bump github.com/aperturerobotics/protobuf-go-lite from 0.14.0 to 0.15.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​253](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/253)
- crit: humanize INETSK fields in files.img JSON output by [@​greenblade29](https://redirect.github.com/greenblade29) in [#​247](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/247)
- rpc: add image\_io\_mode option ([#​254](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/issues/254)) by [@​dfeigin-nv](https://redirect.github.com/dfeigin-nv) in [#​255](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/255)
- Bump release to 8.4.0 by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​256](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/256)

#### New Contributors

- [@​greenblade29](https://redirect.github.com/greenblade29) made their first contribution in [#​247](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/247)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.3.0...v8.4.0>

</details>
